title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with sync/async APIs, model pulling, and streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing ergonomic wrappers over Ollama’s REST endpoints with Tokio streaming.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client with conversation history, markdown rendering, and keybindings.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function calling, JSON mode, vision, RAG, fine-tuning, and deployment patterns.

title: ollama-nvidia-trt
summary: Experimental backend replacing llama.cpp with NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM for faster GPU inference.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain in under 100 lines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model to your server with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that answers questions using Ollama and keeps history in-thread.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper with GenServer behavior for streaming chat and model management.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an AI sidebar powered by any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings for the Ollama API.
